rows.title: Zion Human History Museum
rows.notes: Step to the south-facing patio to capture stunning views of the Towers of the Virgin canyon walls as they glow with the evening light.
rows.planning_note: Starting with this indoor activity because you'll arrive at 09:00. The museum offers both a relaxing introduction to Zion's history and iconic views without physical exertion.

rows.title: Lunch at Oscar's Café
rows.notes: Known for its hearty burgers and local craft beers.
rows.planning_note: Enjoy a casual lunch in Springdale at Oscar's Café, known for hearty meals that set a strong foundation for the day.

rows.title: Pa'rus Trail
rows.notes: Look towards the Watchman bathed in evening light for a perfect view.
rows.planning_note: Choose this paved, stroller-friendly trail as your first outdoor connection with Zion. It's a short walk that showcases iconic vistas while accommodating the family's reduced energy after travel.

rows.title: Dinner at Spotted Dog Café
rows.notes: Refined dishes made from local ingredients with lovely views of the canyon.
rows.planning_note: Suitable for a comforting evening meal with a relaxing atmosphere to unwind on your first day.

rows.title: Big Bend Viewpoint
rows.notes: Position yourself across from Angel's Landing to spot California condors.
rows.planning_note: A short, relaxing conclusion to a long day — enjoy soft evening light before heading back to Springdale.

rows.title: Dinner at King's Landing Bistro
rows.notes: Indulge in dishes that are a fusion of classic and modern flavors using locally sourced ingredients.
rows.planning_note: End the day with a satisfying meal that reflects both the adventurous spirit of Zion and the comforts of American cuisine.

rows.title: Rest / free time at accommodation
rows.notes: Unwind and recharge with some downtime in a comfortable setting.
rows.planning_note: Inserted to ensure adequate rest and flexibility during the afternoon.

rows.title: Emerald Pools Trail
rows.notes: Spot hanging gardens at the junction near Lower Emerald Pool.
rows.planning_note: Scheduling it in the cool morning hours ensures a pleasant hike and allows for intimate encounters with Zion's lush pockets and waterfalls.

rows.title: Lunch at Cafe Soleil
rows.notes: A charming café known for fresh salads, sandwiches, and coffee.
rows.planning_note: A casual and kid-friendly spot perfect for recharging after your morning hike.

rows.title: Zion Canyon Scenic Drive
rows.notes: Experience quieter stops with strategic views while using the park shuttle.
rows.planning_note: An afternoon scenic drive offers rest while still immersing you in Zion's grandeur, and using the shuttle system minimizes effort for the family.

rows.title: Dinner at Bit & Spur Restaurant & Saloon
rows.notes: Southwestern-inspired dishes and a laid-back atmosphere.
rows.planning_note: Close to your accommodations, making it a convenient choice to conclude a relaxed and enjoyable day.

rows.title: Timber Creek Overlook Trail
rows.notes: Catch a stunning view of Zion's peaks after rain.
rows.planning_note: Shifting the start time to 08:00 to allow a less strenuous morning while still providing soft lighting for photos.

rows.title: Travel from Kolob Canyons to Checkerboard Mesa
Checkerboard Mesa
rows.notes: For the best views, take the short trail to the viewpoint.
rows.planning_note: An hour allows ample time to explore the mesa's unique patterns before midday heat.

rows.title: Lunch at Zion Pizza & Noodle Company
rows.notes: Great for families with a diverse menu offering pizzas, pastas, and local brews.
rows.planning_note: Refuel with diverse options that please different palates in a cozy setting.

rows.title: Watch the Sunset at Smithsonian Butte
rows.notes: Position halfway up the trail for stunning sunset views.
rows.planning_note: Conclude the day with a spectacular sunset, perfect for reflecting on the day's adventures and ideal lighting for photography.

rows.title: Dinner at Whiptail Grill
rows.notes: Known for creative Southwestern dishes and outdoor seating with views.
rows.planning_note: A relaxed choice with vibrant flavors to end the day around Springdale.

rows.title: Breakfast at MeMe's Café
rows.notes: Famous for hearty breakfasts with fresh ingredients.
rows.planning_note: Start your last day with a satisfying breakfast that will keep everyone full during your travels.

rows.title: Visit Springdale Farmers Market
rows.notes: Discover local ceramics by Tom Burr, a hidden gem.
rows.planning_note: Explore the market for souvenirs and engaging interactions with local artisans, a perfect cultural touch before departure.

rows.title: Lunch at Zion Canyon Brew Pub
rows.notes: Relax with classic American fare and locally brewed beers.
rows.planning_note: A good spot for a final meal in Zion, combining family-friendly environment with satisfying food.

change_log: Day 2: Removed The Narrows activity due to effort level not suitable for family_young.
Day 2: Added rest/free time at accommodation for a relaxing afternoon.
Day 4: Shifted Timber Creek Overlook Trail from 07:00 to 08:00 to avoid early start conflict.
